## Lens Idea

## Suggested Domain

If no existing domain fits, suggest a new one.

## Expert Focus

Describe the expertise this lens agent should have. What specific patterns, anti-patterns, or risks should it look for?

## Example Findings

Give 1-3 examples of issues this lens would create:

3. ...

## Prior Art

Are there existing tools, linters, or SAST rules that cover this area? (optional)
